Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add dual-section attendance system for Math Stat II Spring 2026

- Deactivate 2025 Math Stat I attendance links
- Add multi-section \(A/B\) + Present/Late support to Google Apps Script
- Create standalone QR page at /attendance/math-stat-2/
- Embed attendance QR slides in all 7 lecture QMD files
- Add attendance-qr-slide.js for Reveal.js QR integration
- Update attend-math-stat-2.js with new GAS deployment URL
- Recompile all lecture HTML files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
